a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: International tourist expenditure within the country they visit, 2022
This data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.
Data source: UNWTO (2024); OECD (2024); Multiple sources compiled by World Bank (2024)

Note: This data is expressed in
international-$
at 2021 prices. Transactions associated with all types of foreign visitors considered, including
students or seasonal workers, which can be significant in certain countries.
